Comment: fix prod districts url and redeploy

commands:
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && python3 - <<"PY"
from pathlib import Path
path = Path(".env")
text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
old = "RESULTS_API_DISTRICTS_URL=s3://bkk-election-images-prod/api-data/master-data/election-areas-bangkok.json"
new = "RESULTS_API_DISTRICTS_URL=s3://ch7-static-bkkelection2569/api-data/master-data/election-areas-bangkok.json"
if old in text:
    text = text.replace(old, new)
elif "RESULTS_API_DISTRICTS_URL=" in text:
    import re
    text = re.sub(r"^RESULTS_API_DISTRICTS_URL=.*$", new, text, flags=re.M)
else:
    text += "\n" + new + "\n"
path.write_text(text, encoding="utf-8")
print(new)
PY
chmod 600 .env && docker compose --env-file .env config --quiet && chmod +x deploy/ec2/deploy.sh && ./deploy/ec2/deploy.sh'
